Name: Reptile Water and Food Bowl Rock
Short description: Naturalistic, easy-clean reptile water and food bowl with a sealed waterproof interior. Available in three sizes and five stylised rock finishes.
Description:
Part of our Silk Lab stylised rock range, the Reptile Water and Food Bowl is the natural-looking feeder and water dish that disappears into a vivarium without compromising on hygiene.

The interior is finished with a smooth, sealed, non-porous lining that resists liquid soak-through, prevents odours and bacterial build-up, and wipes clean in seconds.

Key features

  • Waterproof sealed interior — food-safe, hygienic, easy to wipe down
  • Multi-use — water, greens, veg, insects, pellets, prepared diets
  • Stylised rock finish — suits desert, woodland and tropical setups
  • Three sizes — Standard, Large and XL
  • One-of-a-kind — natural colour variations mean no two bowls are identical (Rainbow especially)
